{{CargoRelic
|name=Dark Lord's Diary
|class_id=20100
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=As the Dark Lord believes that he will rule the world one day, keeping a diary has become an unbreakable ritual. As he penned down all his thoughts honestly and injected his spirit into the diary, those who have a weak mind may turn into a believer upon reading it!
|fame=13
|art=14
|fth=14
|civ=33
|tech=16
|ss1=Against King of Light, Deal +1000% DMG<br>Snail Leadership +1
|ss2=Against King of Light, Deal +1000% DMG<br>Snail Leadership +2
|ss3=Against King of Light, Deal +1000% DMG<br>Snail Leadership +3
|ss4=Against King of Light, Deal +1000% DMG<br>Snail Leadership +3
|ss7=Against King of Light, Deal +1000% DMG<br>Snail Leadership +3<br> (Awakened)
}}
